infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Holy Bible uses your camera to create verse photo overlays and capture moments of faith.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Holy Bible uses your microphone to record voice prayers and transcribe them to text.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Holy Bible accesses your photo library to let you overlay Bible verses on your photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Holy Bible saves verse photos to your library so you can share them.

plugins.cameraPermission: Holy Bible needs camera access to create verse photo overlays.

plugins.photosPermission: Holy Bible accesses your photos to overlay Bible verses on them.
plugins.cameraPermission: Holy Bible needs camera access to take verse photos.
